fields.title: Butter Chicken
fields.description: Tender chicken simmered in a rich, creamy tomato sauce.
fields.ingredients:
Chicken
Butter
Tomato Puree
Cream
Spices
fields.instructions:
1.Marinate the chicken.
2.Cook the chicken.
3.Prepare the gravy.
4.Mix and simmer.
5. Serve hot

fields.title: Margherita Pizza
fields.description: Classic Italian pizza topped with tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil leaves.
fields.ingredients:
Pizza Dough
Tomato Sauce
Mozzarella Cheese
Basil Leaves
Olive Oil
Salt
fields.instructions:
1. Prepare the pizza dough.
2. Spread tomato sauce over the dough.
3. Add mozzarella cheese.
4. Bake in a preheated oven.
5. Garnish with basil leaves.
6. Slice and serve.

fields.title: Beef Tacos
fields.description: Crispy tacos filled with seasoned beef and fresh toppings.
fields.ingredients:
Taco Shells
Ground Beef
Onion
Tomatoes
Lettuce
Cheese
Taco Seasoning
Salt
fields.instructions:
1. Cook the beef with taco seasoning.
2. Warm the taco shells.
3. Fill shells with beef.
4. Add lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese.
5. Serve immediately.

fields.title: Chicken Biryani
fields.description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with marinated chicken and aromatic spices.
fields.ingredients:
Chicken
Basmati Rice
Onion
Tomatoes
Yogurt
Mint Leaves
Coriander Leaves
Ginger Garlic Paste
Biryani Masala
Saffron
Salt
fields.instructions:
1. Marinate the chicken.
2. Cook rice until partially done.
3. Prepare the chicken masala.
4. Layer rice and chicken.
5. Cook on low flame.
6. Garnish and serve.

fields.title: Paneer Tikka
fields.description: Grilled paneer cubes marinated with yogurt and aromatic spices.
fields.ingredients:
Paneer
Yogurt
Red Chilli Powder
Turmeric Powder
Garam Masala
Capsicum
Onion
Salt
fields.instructions:
1. Prepare the marinade.
2. Add paneer and vegetables.
3. Marinate for 30 minutes.
4. Grill until golden.
5. Serve with mint chutney.

fields.title: Sushi Rolls
fields.description: Delicate sushi rolls filled with fresh vegetables and seafood.
fields.ingredients:
Sushi Rice
Nori Sheets
Cucumber
Carrot
Avocado
Salmon
Soy Sauce
fields.instructions:
1. Cook sushi rice.
2. Place nori on bamboo mat.
3. Spread rice evenly.
4. Add fillings.
5. Roll tightly.
6. Slice and serve.

fields.title: Chocolate Brownie
fields.description: Rich and fudgy chocolate brownies with a soft center.
fields.ingredients:
Dark Chocolate
Butter
Sugar
Flour
Eggs
Vanilla Essence
fields.instructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter.
2. Mix sugar and eggs.
3. Add flour and chocolate mixture.
4. Pour into baking tray.
5. Bake for 25 minutes.
6. Cool and serve.

fields.title: Veg Fried Rice
fields.description: A quick and delicious rice dish loaded with fresh vegetables and aromatic sauces.
fields.ingredients:
2 cups cooked rice
1 carrot
1 capsicum
1 onion
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp pepper powder
Salt to taste
fields.instructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan.
2. Add vegetables and stir fry.
3. Add rice and sauces.
4. Mix well and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
